login.title: Welcome back. Transform your mind through voice.
login.heading: Sign In
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue
login.callbackFailed: Sign in with Google failed. Please try again or use email and password.

signup.title: Begin your transformation.
signup.subtitle: Create your account
signup.heading: Create Account
signup.termsNotice: By signing up, you agree to our {termsLink} and {privacyLink}.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password.
forgotPassword.heading: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.successMessage: Check your email for a password reset link.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password.
resetPassword.heading: Reset Password
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in.
resetPassword.invalidLink: Invalid or expired reset link. Please request a new password reset.

signupSuccess.title: Check Your Email
signupSuccess.message: We've sent a verification email to {{email}}. Please check your inbox and click the verification link to activate your account.

confirmEmail.title: Confirm your email
confirmEmail.heading: Check your inbox
confirmEmail.description: We sent a confirmation link to your email address. Click the link to verify your account.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
validation.passwordComplexity: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one number
validation.termsRequired: You must accept the terms of service
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
validation.acceptTermsRequired: You must accept the terms of service

errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
errors.emailAlreadyInUse: An account with this email already exists.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.serviceUnavailable: Authentication service unavailable. Please try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
